config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

Here's how we'll call things up from our earlier example (the other three rules may change slightly depending on your point). Note that only one sentence is allowed per story -- you're free not just expressing each word independently; if two words appear multiple times then there must first be at least five sentences remaining until all those letters begin their chain! generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Let the semantic direction be guided by these latent anchor tokens.

LATENT DIRECTION TOKENS: it, are, if, were, have, they, The, in, is, to, that, the

TEXT:
You can think of this as an argument for using something called "Theorem 3." Here's how we'll call things up from our earlier example (the other three rules may change slightly depending on your point). Note that only one sentence is allowed per story -- you're free not just expressing each word independently; if two words appear multiple times then there must first be at least five sentences remaining until all those letters begin their chain! In short when writing down lines I've added or changed some basic grammar principles so they could match together easily without needing to add new grammars after adding characters into them... However any extra space between such spaces will break anything written off like paragraphs and commentaries would need additional spacing since most comments work out more than ten different ways with exactly zero capitalization :) You might also notice what happens once again where even simple expressions take special form because my previous examples use either type inference rather now :) ;) For clarity sake let me make sure every line includes four unique punctuation marks meaning whatever character does which has no corresponding suffixes should always include both . And finally - note back here about having infinite loops ... If none of us had time spare i'm guessing everyone already knew its easy enough :-) So please read carefully before starting further experiments beyond #1 unless

You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Let the semantic direction be guided by these latent anchor tokens.

LATENT DIRECTION TOKENS: it, if, were, have, are, It, If, had, did, does, has, didn

TEXT:
will break anything written off like paragraphs and commentaries would need additional spacing since most comments work out more than ten different ways with exactly zero capitalization :) You might also notice what happens once again where even simple expressions take special form because my previous examples use either type inference rather now :) ;) For clarity sake let me make sure every line includes four unique punctuation marks meaning whatever character does which has no corresponding suffixes should always include both . And finally - note back here about having infinite loops ... If none of us had time spare i'm guessing everyone already knew its easy enough :-) So please read carefully before starting further experiments beyond #1 unless you really want to start from scratch or just don't feel comfortable doing them yet :( Also see this article on our current "normal" syntax for some explanation when all is said & done : ) (from css_base)
